name: Manage cases orchestrator
description: Create or update Salesforce Case by idempotency_token. Resolves guest_email→contact_id and room_number→room_id automatically. Requires idempotency_token; optional guest_email, room_number, type, priority, status, subject, description, origin (Web/Phone/Email/Internal). Returns case_id/case_number or error codes (400: guest/room not found).
